name: chrome-toolkit
title: Chrome Toolkit
description: Chrome browser utilities: copy URLs, extract HTML and cookies, search tab groups, and more.
author: arcinv

commands.name: copy-url
commands.title: Copy Chrome URL
commands.description: Copy the URL of the active Chrome tab to the clipboard

commands.name: copy-markdown-link
commands.title: Copy Chrome Markdown Link
commands.description: Copy the URL and title of the active Chrome tab as a Markdown link

commands.name: extract-html
commands.title: Extract Chrome HTML
commands.description: Extract and copy the body HTML of the active Chrome tab

commands.name: extract-cookies
commands.title: Extract Chrome Cookies
commands.description: Extract cookies from the active Chrome tab as a JSON list

commands.name: search-cookie
commands.title: Search Chrome Cookie
commands.description: Search cookies by name from the active Chrome tab and copy name or value

commands.name: search-tab-group
commands.title: Search Chrome Tab Group
commands.description: Search tab groups by name in the front Chrome window and switch to one

commands.name: open-in-atlas
commands.title: Open in Atlas
commands.subtitle: Chrome Tab → Atlas
commands.description: Open the active Chrome tab URL in ChatGPT Atlas browser
